_comment: User-editable manual values. For any provider you cannot automate (e.g. CLP OTP), set PROVIDER_MODE=manual in the Action and put the latest number you read off the portal here. Only 'value' is required per provider; unit/period/label are optional and will be filled in with defaults. asOf should be an ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (e.g. 2026-06-27T00:00:00Z); leave it out to use 'now'. A null value means 'no manual value' (provider falls back to scrape/last-known/error).
